steps.title: Locate the fossil age
steps.content: The first sentence directly states that Wang and colleagues discovered a 164-million-year-old plant fossil in China. The Jurassic period range is only background context for the discovery's significance.

steps.title: Separate context from answer
steps.content: A is not stated as the fossil's age. B and D come from the Jurassic period range, not from the age of the specific fossil. The requested age is given directly in the opening sentence. The answer is C.
